description: You choose from an expanded list of spells when you learn a warlock spell. The following spells are added to the warlock spell list for you.
2nd - Blindness Deafness, Pass Without A Trace

theStone.description: It is smooth, glossy and deep black. At 1st level it is given to Nadia as she moves from a city of white to one of red. With the stone's presence, she may turn that small stone into any weapon she chooses and wield it with a skill not reflecting her experience [she has proficiency] . While wielding this weapon, she may use the spell Hex as a free action without expending. If the target is killed she regains hp equal to her level + charisma modifier. Critical hits with the stone are now 18, 19, and 20s.

theSight.description: At level 1, Nadia also gains the ability to see through any darkness as if it were bright for up to 100ft. And as if it were dim for another 30ft.
